import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/org-admin/SurveyManagement.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/SurveyManagement.tsx");

}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import {
  ClipboardList,
  Plus,
  Edit,
  Trash2,
  Users,
  BarChart3,
  CheckCircle,
  Clock,
  Send
} from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
const mockSurveys = [
  {
    id: "1",
    title: "Workplace Safety Feedback",
    description: "Help us improve our safety standards",
    status: "active",
    responses: 45,
    totalQuestions: 3,
    createdDate: "2026-03-10",
    isAnonymous: true
  },
  {
    id: "2",
    title: "Employee Satisfaction Survey",
    description: "Share your thoughts about your work environment",
    status: "active",
    responses: 32,
    totalQuestions: 3,
    createdDate: "2026-03-05",
    isAnonymous: true
  },
  {
    id: "3",
    title: "Training Needs Assessment",
    description: "Identify training opportunities",
    status: "closed",
    responses: 67,
    totalQuestions: 1,
    createdDate: "2026-02-15",
    isAnonymous: false
  },
  {
    id: "4",
    title: "IT System Feedback",
    description: "Help us improve our technology",
    status: "draft",
    responses: 0,
    totalQuestions: 4,
    createdDate: "2026-04-01",
    isAnonymous: true
  }
];
export default function SurveyManagement() {
  _s();
  const [surveys, setSurveys] = useState(mockSurveys);
  const [showCreateModal, setShowCreateModal] = useState(false);
  const [selectedSurvey, setSelectedSurvey] = useState(null);
  const [newSurvey, setNewSurvey] = useState({
    title: "",
    description: "",
    isAnonymous: false,
    totalQuestions: 3
  });
  const activeSurveys = surveys.filter((s) => s.status === "active");
  const draftSurveys = surveys.filter((s) => s.status === "draft");
  const closedSurveys = surveys.filter((s) => s.status === "closed");
  const totalResponses = surveys.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.responses, 0);
  const getStatusBadge = (status) => {
    const styles = {
      draft: "bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400 border-gray-500/30",
      active: "bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 border-green-500/30",
      closed: "bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 border-red-500/30"
    };
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "span", _fgS: "dmzt0", _fgB: 1779104381634, className: `px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium border ${styles[status]}`, "data-fg-dmzt0": "418.266:425.22135:/src/app/pages/org-admin/SurveyManagement.tsx:94:7:2318:159:e:span:x", children: status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + status.slice(1) }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/SurveyManagement.tsx",
      lineNumber: 114,
      columnNumber: 7
    }, this);
  };
  const handleAction = (action, survey) => {
    switch (action) {
      case "view":
        alert(`👁️ Viewing survey: ${survey.title}`);
        break;
      case "edit":
        alert(`✏️ Editing survey: ${survey.title}`);
        break;
      case "delete":
        if (confirm(`Delete survey "${survey.title}"?`)) {
          setSurveys(surveys.filter((s) => s.id !== survey.id));
          alert("🗑️ Survey deleted");
        }
        break;
      case "results":
        setSelectedSurvey(survey);
        break;
      case "publish":
        alert(`📢 Publishing survey: ${survey.title}`);
        setSurveys(surveys.map((s) => s.id === survey.id ? { ...s, status: "active" } : s));
        break;
      case "close":
        alert(`🔒 Closing survey: ${survey.title}`);
        setSurveys(surveys.map((s) => s.id === survey.id ? { ...s, status: "closed" } : s));
        break;
    }
  };

          FGCmp,
          {
            _fgT: "button",
            _fgS: "dmzt233",
            _fgB: 1779104381634,
            onClick: () => {
              if (!newSurvey.title.trim() || !newSurvey.description.trim()) {
                alert("⚠️ Please fill in all required fields");
                return;
              }
              const survey = {
                id: Date.now().toString(),
                title: newSurvey.title,
                description: newSurvey.description,
                status: "draft",
                responses: 0,
                totalQuestions: newSurvey.totalQuestions,
                createdDate: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString().split("T")[0],
                isAnonymous: newSurvey.isAnonymous
              };
              setSurveys([survey, ...surveys]);
              setShowCreateModal(false);
              setNewSurvey({ title: "", description: "", isAnonymous: false, totalQuestions: 3 });
              alert("✅ Survey created successfully!");
            },
            className: "flex-1 px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-teal-600 to-teal-500 text-white rounded-lg hover:shadow-lg transition-all font-medium",
